name: Funai Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Funai Electric Co., Ltd. manufactures and supplies display, digital media products, office Solutions, and development and new businesses solutions worldwide. The company offers flat-panel televisions; DVD/BD-related products; Blu-ray disk players and recorders; inkjet printer products comprising ink cartridges; dental CT scanning devices; products for installation in vehicles; and other products for the medical and healthcare sector. It sells its products under the FUNAI, Kodak, Philips, Magnavox, and Sanyo brand name. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Daito, Japan.
